_ref: 三十三天 (Trāyastriṃśa) — 33 Heavens in Buddhist cosmology

0_recognition.label: Recognition
0_recognition.description: Camera opens. Silence. The painting is present.

1_presence.label: Presence
1_presence.description: The butterfly appears. Nothing else yet.

2_archive.label: The Archive Surfaces
2_archive.description: Museum images drift from the painting into the space around it.

3_self.label: The Self Enters
3_self.description: Front camera captures the viewer. They enter the archive.

4_dissolution.label: Dissolution
4_dissolution.description: The boundary between painting, archive, and viewer dissolves.
